heading: Revocation or denial of passport in case of certain unpaid taxes
label: 2714a Revocation or denial of passport in case of certain unpaid taxes

children.heading: Authority to deny or revoke passport
children.label: e Authority to deny or revoke passport

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided under subparagraph (B), upon receiving a certification described in from the Secretary of the Treasury, the Secretary of State shall not issue a passport to any individual who has a seriously delinquent tax debt described in such section.section 7345 of title 26

children.heading: Emergency and humanitarian situations
children.label: B Emergency and humanitarian situations
children.text: Notwithstanding subparagraph (A), the Secretary of State may issue a passport, in emergency circumstances or for humanitarian reasons, to an individual described in such subparagraph.

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary of State may revoke a passport previously issued to any individual described in paragraph (1)(A).

children.heading: Limitation for return to United States
children.label: B Limitation for return to United States
i
children.text: limit a previously issued passport only for return travel to the United States; or

children.label: ii
children.text: issue a limited passport that only permits return travel to the United States.

children.heading: Hold harmless
children.label: 3 Hold harmless
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury, the Secretary of State, and any of their designees shall not be liable to an individual for any action with respect to a certification by the Commissioner of Internal Revenue under .section 7345 of title 26

children.heading: Revocation or denial of passport in case of individual without social security account number
children.label: f Revocation or denial of passport in case of individual without social security account number
i
children.text: does not include the social security account number issued to that individual, or

children.label: ii
children.text: includes an incorrect or invalid social security number willfully, intentionally, negligently, or recklessly provided by such individual,

children.heading: Emergency and humanitarian situations
children.label: B Emergency and humanitarian situations
children.text: Notwithstanding subparagraph (A), the Secretary of State may issue a passport, in emergency circumstances or for humanitarian reasons, to an individual described in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary of State may revoke a passport previously issued to any individual described in paragraph (1)(A).

children.heading: Limitation for return to United States
children.label: B Limitation for return to United States
i
children.text: limit a previously issued passport only for return travel to the United States; or

children.label: ii
children.text: issue a limited passport that only permits return travel to the United States.

children.heading: Removal of certification from record when debt ceases to be seriously delinquent
children.label: g Removal of certification from record when debt ceases to be seriously delinquent
children.text: If pursuant to subsection (c) or (e) of the Secretary of State receives from the Secretary of the Treasury a notice that an individual ceases to have a seriously delinquent tax debt, the Secretary of State shall remove from the individual’s record the certification with respect to such debt.section 7345 of title 26

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: i Effective date
children.text: The provisions of, and amendments made by, this section shall take effect on .December 4, 2015
